name: rw-research-skill
description: 通过 4 个入口处理研究启动、论文证据、研究审查和论文写作。

interface.shortDescription: Use four entries to route and carry out research workflows.
interface.longDescription: RW Research Skill exposes four user-facing entries for research setup and progression, paper reading and evidence, research design and review, and academic writing and submission. Twenty-one internal skills remain available for routing and compatibility.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use one of the four RW entries. Start with $rw-research-router when the current research stage is unclear.
